# Retroactive Funding and Small Grants Pool

> *tl;dr -- Encourage creators (artists and devs) to build with Nouns by having a pool of funds held in a Safe for this purpose. The Safe will be used immediately to recognize existing a few creators in our community while also allowing fast funding of small, one-off, or alpha version projects as they appear.*


### Past and Fast
While Nouns DAO governance works well for larger projects, the multi-step, on-chain proposal process is not ideal for encouraging small, one-off, or alpha versions of projects/tooling. Despite this, many Nouns community members have added to the ecosystem and it would be great to honor their contribution.

To solve both of these issues, we'd like to propose that a pool of capital be sent to a Nouners controlled Safe. A Safe is much quicker mechanism to coordinate and distribute funds. We would like 20 ETH to pilot the pool, with a suggested range of 0.25-2 ETH per project, with the aim of:

1. acknowledging, through retroactive funding, past contributions to the Nouns ecosystem
1. granting funds for the development of small, one-off, or alpha version projects
1. encouraging building and signalling that retroactive funding is a viable way to build on Nouns

# What Is Nouns Almanac Second Edition

The Nouns Almanac Second Edition is a physical book featuring Nouns 257 - 512, following the First Edition that featured Nouns 0 - 256. Each Noun receives a full page feature including unique traits, commentary and buyer details as at the publication date.

![](https://i.imgur.com/gx7DVXJ.jpg)

The Nouns Almanac is a series of four reference guide books documenting the first 1,024 Nouns ever born over a 36 month period. 

**Publication Dates**
Nouns Almanac 1st Edition: May 16th 2022
Nouns Almanac 2st Edition: December 10th 2022

**Nouns Featured**
Nouns Almanac 1st Edition: 0 - 256 *complete and published May 16th 2022*
Nouns Almanac 2nd Edition: 257 - 513 **Proposal Delivery Dec 10th 2022**
Nouns Almanac 3rd Edition: 514 - 770 *planned H1 2023*
Nouns Almanac 4th Edition: 771 - 1,024 *planned H2 2023*

# Success To Date
Created a metaverse native 'walkbook' of the Nouns Almanac where Noun curious people can walk through the first 30 pages, launching on the Nouniversary 8/8.

# Nouns Animated Short Film with Los Angeles Red Carpet Premiere

My name is Fedja, and I’m a Montenegrin recent USC graduate, writer, and filmmaker. I was introduced to Nouns by Euwyn (Noun #122 and #341), and fell enamored with the sense of community I’ve observed so far. Nounish-ness is special, and I’d love to bottle up a bit of this and spread the word about Nouns to larger audience.

This proposal is for a community-driven, studio-quality animated short film starring a Noun, with a red carpet event in Los Angeles to cap off production and bring Nouns and film community members together to inspire more collaborations.

With an origin story of falling out of their owner’s laptop - think “Finding Nemo” - the protagonist Noun will be animated in stop-motion style, composited on real footage, and film their own journey home. With the Nouns community involvement at each step, the story will be written to be captivating to a broad international audience across different languages, crypto-native and not. 

## Why?

Allow us to introduce you to: The Noun. An animated Noun, fallen out of his owner’s laptop and finding himself lost in the real world. Starting with an animated short, audiences worldwide will watch the charming, adorable, and sneakily snarky Noun overcome obstacles, find and lose love, and much more as he films his journey home. Modernizing the mold of fictional personalities like Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, or Annoying Orange, and inspired by early Pixar shorts, we aim to make the Noun into a well-loved, viral, memeable, sharable character. 

A big part of our effort will be involving the community in writing a unique, compelling narrative for the noun. As a storyteller, this is where I’ll be focused. The intimacy of telling his story from his POV, with his phone camera, intercut with 3rd-person footage of his adventures, will build a lasting emotional relationship with his audience that will transfer into future projects, from this team and others. Whether it be longer YouTube videos, a TV series, or even his own feature film, people will follow the Noun wherever he goes — in the world or online.

His story will be designed to be saturated with clipable, memeable, shareable moments that don’t need context to go viral on their own. However, for the curious viewer, the clips bring them in to a larger narrative designed and produced around a genuine story and loveable protagonist.

## Community-Driven Production

Ultimately, we want the character, and the project as a whole, to be completely emblematic of all that is Nounish. Yes, this means quirkiness, humor, personality and spontaneity, but it also means myriad factors and traits we can’t even begin to predict. This is why throughout the entire creative process we will hold bi-weekly town halls to discuss the script and invite members to share their thoughts. The character bio, the general plot, the finished screenplay, design, locations, all of it. We promise to be receptive to feedback, and additionally will host community feedback sessions to ensure our protagonist is as Nounish as can be.

Along the Noun’s journey, he will inevitably interact with other characters and Nouns in the wild, and while the Noun overcomes loneliness, fear, and anxiety, the story will lead towards an ultimate message of the value of community and collective voice. This will open an opportunity for more creatives to build and expand upon what would effectively become the Nouns Cinematic Universe. Other writers, animators, directors, with their own backgrounds, aesthetic styles, and manners of storytelling, can build upon the framework Noun sets and expand with their own real-world Noun characters and stories.

We’re not only creating a viral character who will bring attention to the Nouns project, but a platform upon which like-minded creatives can find opportunities to build art.

## Development


### Pre-Production

6-8 weeks

- Writing
- Location scouting
- Establishing workflow for animation
- Voice actor casting
- The casting will likely be the longest part of pre-production. In building a project based around the personality of one protagonist, the casting is crucial. We do it once, we do it right.

### Production

6-8 weeks

- Filming
- Recording voice lines
- Animation

### Post-Production

1-2 weeks

- Hiring social media marketing specialist to maximize likelihood of going viral
- Setting up digital marketing strategy (trending hashtags, etc)
- Deploying the videos

It is our goal to create a professional, polished, award-worthy product. As such, we’re going to need a professional team. Above is our outlined 25 ETH budget, covering a worst-case scenario which can promise a perfect result. We will strive to remain under that budget, however, and any remaining surplus will go towards the following, which we hope piques your interest.

## Los Angeles Red Carpet Premiere 

As the Noun character falls into the real world, so to do we wish to bring this to life. To cap off production, we will host a screening event in Los Angeles with a Nouns step and repeat banner, red carpet, and more, inviting members of the Nouns and film community. It’ll be an opportunity to meet the team behind the project, celebrate together, and provide another occasion for the Nouns community to gather and grow.

## The Team

Who are we!? We’re (mostly) recent graduates out of LA and Austin, Texas, trying to carve our way creatively. With backgrounds in literature, screenwriting, film production, animation, and design, we’re coming together to build something not only with catchy style, but with weighted substance. We don’t just want to work with Nouns to make *something* — we believe we can make something *great.*

With previous work in development with [Cinetic Media](https://cineticmedia.com) and consulting on a debut series with [WildcatterLA](https://wildcatterla.com), Fedja also has ample experience in filmmaking, having worked at [Port Media](https://ncmhub.org) for 6 years. # Nouns x Dopamine

*tl:dr: Dopamine & Apenoun propose to collaborate on a Nounish “Non-Fungible Streetwear” drop to be premiered in a Nouns’ exhibition room at Dopamine’s Art Basel Miami launch party.*

*The drop will include ~500 cut-and-sew garments (including t-shirts, hoodies, and more) with cryptographic NFC microchips embedded under Nouns clothing patches, each connected via an on-chain ENS-like chip registry to a Nouns-branded NFT. A white-labeled Nouns browser app will be used for scanning the patch to claim the NFT, as well as for authenticating and verifying the garment owner and manufacturer.* 

*Dopamine, as the first Nouns-fork to incorporate with fashion, would like to include Nouns’ drop as one of a select few to incorporate Dopamine’s new web3 streetwear technology (”Non-Fungible Streetwear”). Nouns streetwear will be sold both at the event and online.*

*Funds requested are 62-82Ξ, with 85% of the primary sales revenue going to the Nouns treasury.*

![Noggles](https://i.imgur.com/6dxtUlx.jpg)

# Introduction

Dopamine is thrilled to collaborate with Apenoun to design a limited-supply Nouns-branded collection of NFT-bundled streetwear. The collection will feature ~500 Nouns streetwear garments, each of which will be patched with a cryptographic NFC chip connecting on-chain to a Nouns-branded NFT that can be authenticated and claimed through a white-labeled Nouns browser app. The branding and experience for this drop will be Nounish end-to-end, and will fully incorporate Dopamine’s new “Non-Fungible Streetwear” technology.

[Dopamine](http://dopamine.xyz/) is the first Nouns-fork to incorporate fashion, with the mission to empower Web3 projects, NFT artists, and collectors through a community-owned ecosystem for Non-Fungible Streetwear. We are crypto natives with a passion for streetwear culture and web3 technology, aiming to bridge the gap between these two worlds. 

Originally inspired by Nouns’ creative governance and community model, we want to become an incubator for up-and-coming streetwear designers and NFT artists and recreate the “Nouns Virtuous Cycle” for the budding web3 streetwear industry. 

With this collab we’re aiming to push the Nounish culture forward and proliferate the Nouns meme and brand across the Metaverse and into mainstream pop culture using a powerful vehicle for hype: streetwear.

# Designs

Dopamine will work closely with Apenoun to design the garments, which will feature the Noggles and the Nouns slogan “One Noun, Every day, Forever.” Around 500 pieces will be made in total, featuring a combination of t-shirts, hoodies, and various other apparel. Quality-wise, this drop will have a premium feel reminiscent of brands such as Fear of God or Acne Studios, leveraging entirely cut and sew assembly. In terms of past experience, Dopamine’s design team has worked with the likes of Billie Eilish, Young Thug’s Spider, and Siberia Hills. 

In addition to the merchandise design, each garment will feature a Nouns clothing patch covering the NFC chip used to connect to its bound Nouns NFT, which itself will include a digital 3D design of the garment along with additional digital accessories (see next section). Finally, the patch itself will also be capable of triggering an AR hologram of the underlying digital design.

# Non-Fungible Streetwear Technology

Dopamine is creating a decentralized fashion technology platform for authenticating and sharing a new form of chip-microchipped streetwear that we call **“Non-Fungible Streetwear”**.

At the core of each Non-Fungible Streetwear piece is a **physical-bound NFT (PNFT)**, an NFT *forever bound* to the garment through an on-chain registry that uses chip-generated ECDSA signatures for resolution, whose media represents a 3D model of the physical streetwear piece. 

By scanning the garment’s patched chip with Dopamine’s white-labeled browser app, garment owners will be able to claim the PNFT, authenticate collection and manufacturer details, and view digital renditions of their streetwear in a 3D-like wardrobe. On top of this, PNFTs may be composed with arbitrary numbers of other digital assets, such as NFTs representing brand-related digital art, music, or perks. 

Below, we dive into more detail on the customization process, on-chain connectivity layer, and scanning flow as it relates to Nouns’ curated Non-Fungible Streetwear collection. 

### Customization Process

![wip10](https://i.imgur.com/gErPzVi.jpg)

The following assets will be required for the Nouns’ Non-Fungible Streetwear collection:

- **Nouns 3D PNFT Design**
The design file for the PNFT, which in this case will be a 3D digital rendition of the Nouns physical garment bundled as a GLTF file.
- **Nouns Accessory Media Files**
Additional digital media files may be provided to build accessory NFTs. These could be anything from Nouns Art Basel POAPs to complementary Nouns digital avatars. Unlike the PNFTs which are forever bound to their garments, these accessory NFTs may be attached and detached on-chain to allow for composability with any Non-Fungible Streetwear pieces.
- **Nouns PNFT Collection Specs**
Ownership attribution for the Nouns’ Non-Fungible Streetwear will revolve around a custom ERC721-compatible Nouns PNFT collection with a fixed supply of ~500, reflecting the total number of garments distributed. Besides the aforementioned accessorizing, additional specs may be added here, such as collection-wide metadata or whitelisting support.

### On-Chain Connectivity

![11](https://i.imgur.com/zs3fcSV.png)

Connection between Nouns streetwear garments to Nouns PNFTs will be entirely on-chain, and will involve three major components: 

**NFC Chip**

Dopamine NFC microchips are machine-washable ~30mm round, 1mm thick chips capable of signing messages. Scanning the patched chip will enable chip-signed attestations (secured at the firmware level) to be passed through the on-chain registry to the Nouns browser app for authentication and claiming.

**Chip Registry**

An ENS-like on-chain registry mapping chip ids to PNFTs will be used for connecting physical and digital worlds together in a truly decentralized manner. Included in each record will be a pre-registered IPFS cert provided by Nouns (e.g. an attestation signed by Nouns Deployer) and the chip manufacturer. 

**Nouns PNFTs**

Nouns PNFTs will act as the virtual representation and authentication interface for the Nouns’ streetwear garments. Unlike most NFTs, which are normally only owned by a user EOA, these will include two forms of ownership attribution - one involving the garment owner, and one involving the paired chip itself. 

### Browser App

The three above components allow the white-labeled Nouns browser app to process claims, verifications, and transfers in a way that is truly 100% decentralized. Below, we outline at a high-level how claims and normal scans work:

**Claims:**

![12](https://i.imgur.com/KLykF7M.png)

Dopamine's Non-Fungible Streetwear uses a physical-first standard for claiming. This means that recipients of the Nouns’ Non-Fungible Streetwear collection will first get the physical garment, and then scan the patched chip using the Nouns browser app shown above to have the ownership attribution of the PNFT assigned to them. For security reasons, only addresses of those which have purchased the collection pieces (either online or live at Art Basel) will be able to invoke the initial claim.

**Scans:**

![13](https://i.imgur.com/uWHAKW2.png)

Anyone with an NFC-enabled smart device will be able to tap their devices on the Nouns’ chip patches to view details regarding garment owner and authenticity through the Nouns browser app. In addition, these scans will showcase the PNFT media assets in an interactive 3D wardrobe-like environment, along with any bundled accessories.

# Liberating Proposal Threshold for 26 years

Change the threshold to put a proposal on-chain from the current 2 votes to 1 vote.

Why:
- We are disenfranchising roughly 80% of noun holders currently.
- We are not seeing many proposals coming in.
- We want to empower any nouner or delegate to participate in the DAO.

Setting the proposal threshold to 1 would require 2 votes again once we passed 9999 nouns in roughly 26 years.

# Xanadu x Nouns: Mega Episode + Real-time Nouns World Toolkit

Dear NounsDAO,

Welcome to Xanadu… a story world made by one dude with godlike creation powers forging a new category of entertainment that twists fiction with reality and collides pop culture with the coolest things on the internet. It’s a wild, novel genre that’s inspiring a new generation of creators, artists, and storytellers. 

### Click image to watch Blu present the proposal
[![Image alt text](https://img.youtube.com/vi/ktZaS52qyYA/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ktZaS52qyYA) 

We’re a team of two with a shared passion for bringing avatars and worlds to life. We want to help bring Nouns into the 3D metaverse with our unique storytelling and world-building skills. We propose a XANADU x NOUNS collaboration consisting of two parts:

### Part One - Nouns Episode of Xanadu 
We would create a mega-episode of Xanadu where Blu, the hero of Xanadu, teams up with Nouns in an action-packed deep dive into the Nouns Universe.

The episode features Blu questing through Planet Nouns desperate for the Nouns help to save him from a posse of intergalactic gangsters. To satisfy the bounty on his head, Blu must submit a winning proposal to Nouns DAO which kicks off a wild escapade through the Nouns City Center, the historic Nouner Capitol building, and the Nouns Underground. Along the way, Blu meets a master Noun who gives him a crash course on NounsDAO, how it works and why it’s awesome — education disguised as Hollywood quality entertainment. But it doesn’t stop there…

![Alt Text](https://aws1.discourse-cdn.com/standard21/uploads/nouns/original/2X/e/e4951cf151fd7bfb2f983a7dbcb7ed901ce5614d.gif)

### Part Two - CC0 Nouns Toolkit
Unlike a Hollywood feature where all the creativity and work vanish after the movie’s made, all of the Nouns assets created for this episode will be crafted into a Nouns World Toolkit that will live on in an innovative and powerful new way — in the hands of the community, available CC0.
This is more than a simple library of assets…

Because Xanadu is built in a game engine (Unreal Engine 5), it’s a story world that can be cinematic, interactive, gamified, live-streamed, or experienced in VR. So, armed with this massive toolkit of AAA animatable Nouns characters & pre-lit, animated environments — complete with how-to guide books & tutorials created by us — the Nouns community can inhabit a Noun for VTubing, Zoom calls, or create cinematic content, marketing materials, NFTs, or even build a Nouns VR experience, game, or metaverse. It’s our hope for this to become the beginning of a dynamic Nouns repository that grows over time and is contributed to by other builders. (Full list of Toolkit deliverables below in Extra Details)

![Alt Text](https://aws1.discourse-cdn.com/standard21/uploads/nouns/original/2X/1/137fa14e33c6b60152c5c4700e5f77bb82b719f1.gif)

### How does this benefit NounsDAO?
- **The Episode** — Exposure for NounsDAO in a novel, powerful narrative – with analytics & insights (average results per episode: 2.7M impressions, 321K views, 12K watch-time hours)
- **The Toolkit** — 3D tools that enables Nouns creators, creations, remixes with other IPs, and continued proliferation of Nouns to a new degree.
- **Our Vision** — Inspire creators with the episode, enable creations with the toolkit, and catalyze a cohort of Nouns as VTubers and next-generation virtual avatars.

### Community 
Working directly with the Nouns community is key for this project in several ways:
1. **Help choose what Nouns derivatives to feature** such as LilNouns, SharkDAO, skateboards from GnarsDAO, and art pieces from prop house. We love the extended Nouns community want to infuse this thriving ecosystem into the Toolkit and Episode.
2. **Help define the 3D style of the Nouns characters and environments**, as well as how Nouns express themselves using motion capture and animation.
3. **Help choose Nouns characters to be featured in the episode.** Some Nouns will be chosen for story purposes but we’d love the community to vote on what other Nouns get featured. Those Nouns holders will have the option to voice & motion capture their own Noun (assuming there’s dialogue).

### The General Timeline
* Phase 1: **Concept & Design + Episode Writing.** starts immediately (est 2 months)
* Phase 2: **Asset creation.** Starts as concepts complete (est 2-3 months) Will overlap with Phase 1
* Phase 3: **Launch Beta Repository.** Nov 2022 Assets are made available as they are created.
* Phase 4: **Episode Production Starts** Jan 2023 *When assets are finished (est 3 months)
Est Episode completion March 2023

### Toolkit Repository Timeline
* Phase 1: **Launch Beta Repository.** Nov 2022 Post assets as they become available
* Phase 2: **Create Beta How to Docs & Tutorials.** (these will roll out starting in Dec thru March)
* Phase 3: **Launch final Toolkit Repository.** March 2023
We will be sharing fun BTS & asset creation along the way via YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram content.

### Our Ask & Budget Breakdown 
We are asking for a total of $307.2K USD (192E @ $1600)
* Toolkit Concept Art & Design — $20,480 (12.8ETH)
* Toolkit 3D Modeling & Texturing — $99,040 (61.9ETH)
* Nouns Character Modeling & Rigging — $33,440 (20.9ETH)

The proposed budget + 15% to cover volatility will be converted to USDC immediately, and everything in excess will be retrurned to the DAO. If, due to high volatility, there is insufficient ETH to cover the proposed budget (307.2K USD), a second proposal will be made.

# Founding Partners of NFT Seattle

(*TLDR, NFT Seattle is the first large scale Web3 event in the entire Pacific Northwest. We think it would be pretty sweet if the Nouns came in as title sponsors of this inaugural event*)

### **DESCRIPTION**

- Becoming the Nounding Partners / Presenting Sponsors of NFT Seattle creates an opportunity for the Nouns to build relationships with the Pacific Northwest’s Web3 community and solidify the Noun meme in the foundation of these new relationships.
- As we establish Seattle as a hub for Web3 innovation, we'd love for the Nouns to come in at the ground level and cement the meme as an integral part of Seattle’s Web3 ecosystem, positioned for maximum and lasting brand exposure. The Web3 community is still growing in Seattle so the probability of reaching new people (vs people that already know about the Nouns) is likely higher here, than most other major US cities. Plus Seattle's technically inclined demographic lends itself well to everything the Nouns stand for, though people here are still warming up to the whole idea of NFT's.

### **WHAT IS NFT SEATTLE**

- NFT Seattle is the first event catering to the broader Web3 community in the Pacific Northwest (Portland, Seattle, Vancouver, BC).
- The vision behind NFT Seattle is to establish Seattle as a hub for Web3 innovation & connect the growing community in the Northwest. We want to unite people in Seattle to educate & expose them to the opportunities & possibilities that Web3 brings to creators, businesses, artists, and communities.
- This event is mainly targeting the Web3 curious and as such, has a heavier leaning towards education.
- NFT Seattle will take place from 9/30/2022 - 10/1/2022 in Seattle at several venues including Block 41 and the Seattle NFT Museum (the worlds first NFT Museum).

### **WHY SHOULD NOUNS BE INVOLVED & WHY IT MATTERS?**

- NFT Seattle presents a unique opportunity for the Nouns to proliferate the Nouns meme and imagery (think, Noggles in downtown Seattle) across a region that is still trying to figure out Web3 but is on the cusp of a major Web3 breakout. A region that has already cemented itself as a global hub for technological and cultural innovation, with everything from Amazon/Microsoft to Starbucks and many more having been birthed here.
- As the first Web3 event in the Pacific Northwest, NFT Seattle will draw people in from Portland, Seattle, Vancouver BC and will lean heavily towards education plus fostering deep, meaningful connection between brands, thought leaders and other attendees. Early data suggests the audience will be a healthy mix between the Web3 curious, and those that are pioneering in the space.
- This event also creates a perfect opportunity for an IRL Noun meetup, for Nouns that are local to the region to come and engage with the local community while providing *Nouns on the Ground* an opportunity to execute their existing IRL events strategy, in a new untapped market. Also, hoping to partner with the Nounish marketing team to up-level the Nounishness of this activation if the prop passes. (Initial conversations have been started).

### **THE BREAKDOWN**

- **Presenting Title Sponsor of NFT Seattle** (”NFT Seattle presented by the Nouns”). Nouns branding will be prominently featured at the Event and the official After Party.
    
 
![](https://i.imgur.com/jDWDkc8.png)

We’ll store this piece for future use, or the Nouns can opt to claim it for use at other IRL events.

# Mucho Love 4 Month Extension

![](https://i.imgur.com/VhBvzNf.jpg)
#### tl;dr:

A volunteering community focused on proliferating Nouns combining volunteering campaigns, community service, and social action.

### Where did Mucho Love come from?

A little bit over a month ago, the prop.house 655 & 656 ([Prop House ](https://prop.house/proposal/656) and [Prop House ](https://prop.house/proposal/655)) passed to fund “Nounifying Children’s Hearts.” This proposal supported the pilot for starting a volunteering community with the target of evolving into a Decentralized Non-Profit Organization.

### What is Mucho Love?

Mucho Love (a lot of love) is a community that seeks to contribute to various causes one event at a time while proliferating Nouns. **Mucho Love is born from the desire to help, creating a community that focuses on volunteer campaigns, community service, and social action**. We seek to impact various causes by addressing problems that affect our society. Mucho Love aims to cultivate a community in which all members feel part of something bigger than themselves, making them feel nounish.

### How does Mucho Love work?

Mucho Love was created by 5 founders, who wear many hats and structured what it is today. We plan to expand the team next year to escalate further and establish more specific scopes. Currently, we have over 30 community members eager to volunteer for the causes we are aiding.

Mucho Love currently works on a 9-step system.

1. **Ideation:** planning and deciding on activities.
2. **Outreach:** contacting the organizations/places, writing letters/petitions, and setting up dates/places.
3. **Chronogram/Requirements:** Itinerary, step-by-step program to be performed on events, pre-event checklist, proofreading.
4. **Quotations:** quotation of each item or service (3 quotations from different companies per item or service)
5. **Payments and Negotiations:** negotiating with businesses, establishing formal relationships, explaining MUCHO LOVE, and paying for services/items.
6. **Pre-Event:** revision of the pre-event checklist, volunteer count, and Zoom meetings with volunteers and multimedia team to prepare for the event.
7. **Event Day:** role call, transportation to the event, itinerary execution, feedback.
8. **Post Event:** post-event multimedia management and feedback from participants.
9. **Documentation:** establishing the framework to replicate the current working system by documenting for the continuous improvement of the project.

### How does this benefit the DAO?

**Charity** is a recurrent activity/topic within the Nounish ecosystem—that’s why we decided to start a nounish volunteering community that makes sure to proliferate Nouns with the values and vision it represents. **Mucho Love aims to become one of the Nounish platforms regarding community service, social work, and volunteering campaigns.** Mucho Love’s activities will all be shared through Twitter and Instagram, appealing to the masses and expanding global Noggle adoption.

Mucho Love is starting operations in the Dominican Republic but aims to develop a model that is replicable internationally. Also, if needed, we want to be able to travel to any part of the world to aid any team who needs help developing charitable efforts in their respective communities. 

### Goals

Our goal is to **establish the foundation of Mucho Love as a future Decentralized Non-Profit Organization** **that will allow us to replicate the model in any part of the world.** The structure/model created will be available for any team that wants to make charitable efforts in their respective communities. We also want to keep collaborating with established Nounish projects (like BigShotKlim’s pins and Messhup’s books) that can contribute with donations to proliferate Nouns further.

Mucho Love will carry out during the 4-month extension events/donations/activities among the following:

* Hospital Robert Ried
* Hospital Hugo Mendoza
* Red Misericordia (Orphanage)
* Hogar Escuela Santo Domingo Savio (Orphanage/School)
* Escuelita Café con Leche (Orphanage/School)

*2 institutions have not given a definitive yes; therefore, they are subject to change.

### Pilot results

The pilot successfully helped children feel joy despite going through difficult moments. We also showed what the Noggles are and what they can do. People fell in love with Messhup’s books and BigShotKlim’s Noggle pins. Children that used glasses felt even more identified with the Noggles. I can genuinely say that the pilot was a success; the Noggles were well received, and we helped out 300 children and their parents while proliferating Nouns, love, and optimism.

300 Children received 300 Nounish goodie bags containing:

* Messhup’s coloring book (300 total)
* Crayola box (300 total)
* Diapers (1440 total)
* Stickers (600 total)
* BigShotKlim’s Noggle Pins (100 total)

![](https://i.imgur.com/96a5gtJ.png)

# The Problem

There is currently no Nouns audio aesthetic, and no environment for it to flourish. There are no sonic logos, sounds or songs that have a consistent use case in the Nouns world. Nounish creators of apps, videos, games and beyond have nowhere to turn for audio. 

Nounish creators have to source their own audio, often out of their own pocket while being forced to manage limited use rights.

All of this makes brand consistency/recognition difficult and next to impossible. Sonic logos, sounds or songs are a core part of any brand.  

![](https://i.imgur.com/VN0FNJY.png)


# Our Solution

**nounsounds.wtf**

We will create a robust website that will act as a hub for all things related to Nouns audio. This will include an easy to use music “PLAYground” to build a unique Nouns song for your project, a repository of samples/sounds/songs and a robust roadmap with processes and structure, allowing our environment to grow.

![](https://i.imgur.com/UevPiIZ.png)

---

# The User Experience

## **Homepage**

![](https://i.imgur.com/Z53wdaT.png)

On the homepage, the latest Noun Sound will be displayed along with the Noun it generates!  **This, and all Noun Sounds, will be available for free use and CC0**.

 How does it generate this Noun Sound you might ask?  Let’s head over to the…

## **PLAYground**

![](https://i.imgur.com/pwDMdY5.png)

The visual Noun will be generated via the PLAYground tab.  

In this area, a song is split into its different tracks. Here, one of the 10 songs created for Nouns will be selected.  Each song will contain 5 variations per instrument. Each instrument will correspond to a Nouns layer whose assets will be randomly generated when the page loads. 

Refreshing the page or hitting the “Randomize” button will randomly select a new SONG and new set of LAYERS.  Every time you create a new Nouns Sound, a unique new Noun will be born to accompany it!

Put together your favorite song tracks for your project and…VOILA!  You now have your own unique Noun Sound.

[![](https://i.imgur.com/kAFMtLi.png)
](https://vimeo.com/738442849/e3cdaf3d87)
WATCH VIDEO: https://vimeo.com/738442849/e3cdaf3d87

## **Sounds**

![](https://i.imgur.com/9DU37V1.png)

If you want to grab any of the full songs, stems, loops, samples or sound effects by themselves- this is the place to go.  Easily filter these via metadata and get to creating your Nounish multimedia! 

# How Does This Proliferate Nouns?

***Sound*** is the backbone of any cohesive brand and multimedia creation.  This CC0 resource will assist in the production of music, apps, games, videos, social content, sonic branding and more- all revolving around Nouns.  As we work along side Nouns DAO in the future, a self sustaining library of high quality audio will fill a void for creators across all mediums of creative content. 

# The Team

With 20+ years of music production and engineering experience, **SuperTightWoody** is a Grammy Nominated music producer.  Having works featured on major label albums, TV shows, movie trailers and television commercials.  In the Nouns space, he has created the theme song for the Nouncil along with theme songs for The Noun Square Twitter spaces (and the “soundboard” for TNS).  As a Nouncil and TNS member- he is very much looking forward to expanding his contributions into the Nouns space.

**Papaya** is a software engineer with 15+ years of experience known for his attention to detail. He has worked on numerous NFT Collections, tools and Defi protocols. He loves building unique experiences for web3 communities and developers. 

# Timeline

The creation of everything laid out in this first proposal will take 3 months to complete from proposal approval.

# Nounish Friends - Stage 2

![](https://i.imgur.com/Dcj8zF9.jpg)

___
**I. WHAT IS THIS PROJECT?**
___
Designed for maximum NOUNish-ness, these colorful 3” tall mini figures are meant to be a fun, low cost and non-crypto-based entry point into the world of “NOUNs.” Nounish Friends will be packed into colorful mystery boxes and presented in eye catching counter display cartons which are found in shops worldwide.
Prop 72 funded with 20ETH to take this project from initial idea, through countless iterations, to the current designs & prototypes. We have communicated updates weekly on the [Discord here](https://discord.com/channels/849745721544146955/973957832015761428) and have had many conversations on [Discourse here](https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/proposal-nounish-friends-nouns-town-collectible-figures-and-more-by-bigshottoyworks/967/42?page=3&fbclid=IwAR2b6AnS2-xKAbn0eja5dL0k1LCufZM4v_nT5NbJXzZ_ZWWb5FEo_PIxly8), gathering feedback from over 50 comments to arrive at the final designs we’re proposing today. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/mJ5emSS.jpg)

___
**II. PROJECT DEVELOPMENT COSTS:**
___
**CURRENT STAGE:**
 - **Engineering:**  tooling masters, paint masks, production molds, Packaging, Final branding, box and display box design and dies: $45K ***(one time cost)***
 - **Manufacturing:** $53K for 10K pcs 
 - **Logistics/warehousing:** $29K
 - **Marketing, project management & B2B & B2C sales:** $40K for 6 months. This involves sample photography,press, targeted social media engagement, onboarding  and follow ups, potential partner onboarding and communications. This includes unexpected sample creations and air shipping for events such as Art Basel, Dcon, NFTNYC and other opportunities world wide while the mass production run is being produced.
 - **TOTAL ASK:** $167K USD

**PAYMENT SCHEDULE:**
Payments to be broken down into 3 milestones as follows: 
 - **35% upfront** ($58,450 USD)
Preproduction deposit for further final development of graphics, packaging templates, tooling molds, paint molds, and final samples.
 - **35% on Milestone 1** ($58,450 USD)
Deposit for mass production deposit once tooling test shots and painted counter sample approvals,
 - **30% on Milestone 2** (50,100 USD)
Full balance paid out once production passes testing. QC inspection and is ready to ship to our warehouse by sea.

**PAYMENT DETAILS**

ETH will be sent to a 2/3 Gnosis Safe with the following signers:
Bigshot Klim - 0xd25912007EBC2527d4ED9DC536f928E550b0f02C
Joshua Fisher - JoshuaFisher.eth
Joel Cares - JoelCares.eth

Our 10,000 physical toys will be utilized for both sales and giveaways for maximum reach and value. We believe that both are important aspect of this proof of concept model moving forward:

"# Nounifying Brazil and Web3 Workshops in communities of Rio de Janeiro

*This proposal submission was executed by [Gnars DAO](https://gnars.com).*

Nounify the skate lane in the Gigoia Island community and onboard 120 teenagers – from 11 to 14 years old – to web3 at the *[Skate Cuida Institute](https://www.instagram.com/skatecuida/?hl=pt)* - both in Rio de Janeiro.

**Why?**

According to [Statista](https://www.statista.com/), **Brazil is the 2nd country with the most people using NFTs (5M users).**

![](https://i.imgur.com/d7fhQsI.png)

Rio de Janeiro stands out as a crypto hub. In June, the 1st international NFT event in Brazil took place in the city. Gathering renowned Brazilian artists, collections of different styles and lectures about web3, NFTs and DAOs, NFT Rio showed the potential of the Brazilian market.

The Nouns DAO featured as one of the main collections during the event. [After the approval of proposal 98](https://nouns.wtf/vote/98), [@beautyandpunk](https://twitter.com/beautyandpunk), [@leoclark](https://twitter.com/leoclark) and [@fabioseva](https://twitter.com/fabioseva) did a great job spreading the noun culture at the conference. We want to further develop this work.

![](https://i.imgur.com/mohS5HA.png)

For this, the plan is to:
## 1) Promote 4 educational workshops about web3 in Gigoia Island, Rio de Janeiro/RJ.

![](https://i.imgur.com/x4A8LV0.png)
*Bob Burnquist with the teenagers from the Skate Cuida Institute*

The workshops are divided in 4 stages:
**a) Wallets and tokens:** first, a “magic trick” makes money disappear… and reappear inside the pocket of an attendee. The instructor explains what are “the secret crypto words”, how they can “control magic internet money”, and how anyone - even kids - can earn, use or store such money.

**b) NFTs:** the instructor shows attendees how digital wallets can hold other digital stuff. A series of these valuable things have been scattered through the Skate Cuida Institute (QR codes linking to a minting page). A treasure hunt leads attendees to earn their first NFTs.

**c) DAO:** the instructor shows a site where they can use their NFTs as tickets to join a club. He tells them there is a proposal there where they can vote for a prize that will be distributed either to half the “club”… or to all of its members - depending on how they vote it. The instructor reveals the results (awarding a prize in crypto to every participant) and teaches basic concepts in cooperation and game theory. He tells the audience the workshop was sponsored by a “club”, too - NounsDAO - that collaborates online to do cool stuff in the real world. And incites attendees they can do the same via the club they now belong to.

**d) Skate & Lunch:** to wrap things up, Bob Burnquist invites the kids for a ride on the Institute’s track, then **food and drinks** are served for all.

We plan to bring 30 kids in each workshop. The goal is to **introduce 120 people to crypto and NFTs** via Nouns DAO.

The end goal is to find a format ([presentation here](https://www.canva.com/design/DAFHzoOmwAE/OhifeRzHPUSLD7X1YLORVQ/view?utm_content=DAFHzoOmwAE&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link&utm_source=publishpresent)) that can be replicated in other communities in a cost-effective way.

**The workshops will be conducted by guiriba, a member of Paradigma Education**. Paradigma is a crypto research house in Brazil with experience ranging from [materials for beginners](https://paradigma.docsend.com/view/vzysv4pg3evfqry9) to courses to [analysis for experts.](https://app.paradigma.education/feed/post/view?id=kru2M8m98ePrweKAjXeu)

## 2) Nounify the skateboard track of Gigoia Island, Rio de Janeiro/RJ.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5iJAROf.png)

***Left:** [Bob Burnquist at the skate park](https://oglobo.globo.com/rio/bairros/niteroi/noticia/2022/06/bob-burnquist-leva-projeto-social-para-o-caramujo-em-niteroi.ghtml). Right: the Brazilian version of Skater Noun was created by [Ozzz](https://twitter.com/ozzzmabro), member of the [Mafriends](https://twitter.com/MafriendsArt) collective.*

While the workshop takes place, Nouns artwork by Brazilian artists will be painted at the Skate Cuida Institute, where classes are taught by Bob Burnquist.
We will bring a film crew and later deliver a clip registering the workshops and painting action.

## 3) Make a donation to the Skate Cuida Institute.

Purchase 3 VR headsets and 3 notebooks for the institute, to support the 4 weekly encounters currently held there, where kids receive cognitive training, skateboarding lessons, food and a safe space to play.

### What is the Skate Cuida Institute and who is Bob Burnquist?

Bob Burnquist is the greatest X-Games winner in history.

A Brazilian skateboarder & ex-videogame star, he now aims to empower unprivileged communities through sports, education and technology.

Skate Cuida Institute is a place in Rio with modest infrastructure where Bob and his team receive dozens of youngsters a week to study and skate together.

Bob is also avowedly a crypto-native. In 2021, he launched his first NFT collection, [Burnquist Gold.](https://twitter.com/bobburnquist/status/1446965292836524039) A fan of the Tezos blockchain, Bob has also experimented with Ethereum.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5hWMyOY.png)

Source: [Viva o Rio.](http://vivario.org.br/bob-burnquist-oferece-oficina-de-skate-no-parque-esportivo-e-social-do-caramujo/)

### **What is the motivation for Nouns DAO to fund the proposal?**

1) To foster web3 proficiency among teenagers from Rio de Janeiro communities.
2) To bring Nouns culture to young people having their first contact with the world of NFTs.
3) To seek media exposure in newspapers like O Globo, with [more than 25M readers and 185M monthly views](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/o-globo-foi-jornal-mais-lido-do-pais-em-2021-25376960); and social media like that of Bob Burnquist, who has more than [160K followers on Twitter](https://twitter.com/bobburnquist) and [770K on Instagram.](https://www.instagram.com/bobburnquist/)
4) Create a cc0 educational material for communities around the world, allowing anyone to translate it and use it to teach web3 to children using Nouns.

### **How much will the action cost?**
**1) 3.5 ETH for the web3 educational program at the Skate Cuida Institute.**
 
- 1.2 ETH: airdrops for the attendees during the 4 workshops (120 x 0.01 ETH per person). The amount in ETH sent to the teens will be done via Polygon. A local business will be on the location, selling snacks and accepting crypto as payment.
- 2.3 ETH: event expenses:
	- 1 ETH for instructor’s transport and accommodation: will be 4 weeks traveling from Minas Gerais to Rio de Janeiro. He will travel to Rio de Janeiro every week, just to give the workshops.
	- 1 ETH for to organize breakfast, lunch, and afternoon coffee for the teenagers to spend the day at the Skate Cuida Institute
	- 0.3 ETH for the costs of printing QR Codes on the skateboard track.
	- 0.7 ETH for to pay the instructor in charge of workshops.

**2) 3 ETH for the artistic initiative.**

- 1 ETH: The money will be used to pay Brazilian artists who will create Brazilian versions of the Nouns. 0.2 ETH will be paid to each of the chosen artists, making it possible to create 5 unique arts. One of them is already created.
- 1 ETH: destined to purchase the materials used in the painting
- 1 ETH: to the artist responsible for painting the Noun on the institute’s skate track. In each of the workshops he will be present, nounifying the skateboard track of the Skate Cuida Institute with the artists’ designs.

**3) Donation of 4 ETH to the Skate Cuida Institute.**
- 1 ETH: for maintenance of the skateboard track at the Institute while the workshops are happening.
- 3 ETH: equipment to encourage teenagers to [learn about web3:](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UDuKAded86Y)
	- 3x AR Oculus Quest 2 (to introduce concepts of virtual worlds more easily and foster the creation of 3D art).
	- 3x Notebook [Ideapad 3i:](https://www.kabum.com.br/produto/254192/notebook-lenovo-ultrafino-ideapad-3i-intel-core-i3-10110u-4gb-ssd-256gb-windows-11-15-6-prata-82bs000jbr?gclid=CjwKCAjwrNmWBhA4EiwAHbjEQI7OaPM7XOhSlqUKD_bRjiN5Pf-8Ty16Ulmszeq3mRP6yCQZvgTZWxoCft0QAvD_BwE) to allow the classes that already take place at the institute to handle more students per lesson.

**4) 2 ETH for film crew to cover the workshop and further publicize the initiative.**

Therefore, **we require 12.5 ETH** for the execution of all the actions listed above."

# nounish ⌐◨-◨  – Telling the stories of Nouns DAO through videos

**TL;DR**
* **Fund *nounish*, a creative agency dedicated to telling the story of Nouns, and the stories of its builders, through video.**
* A team of 10 people; Essentially dedicating Pixel, Goldy’s production company, to Nouns full time.
* Lead by Goldy & 142.
* 6 months of operations.
* $969K requested.

### Summary
* **Long-term Vision:** Help make Nouns a highly recognizable brand globally and inspire ambitious builders to build on the protocol. 
* **Objectives for this proposal:**  
	1. Help anyone who is curious about Nouns, including non-crypto audiences, ***understand* what Nouns is about**.
	2. Onboard new builders & inspire current builders to **make ambitious and impactful proposals**.
	3. Rally the Nouns community around projects that we've funded and **empower it to share our content**. 
	4. Enable builders to use our content to **ease interactions with brands & non-crypto organizations**.
* **Strategy: Focus on Middle of Funnel (read more below)**
	* Make our [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCP4kPIzNhpTGrn75XeLVVXg) an **onboarding tool to Nouns DAO**.
		* Make the channel's page a shareable, digestible, and entertaining repository of videos that cover what Nouns DAO does and funds.
	* Produce & publish **high quality videos about the most promising projects Nouns DAO funds**, to tell their stories in an accessible way.
	* Publish dozens of **"Nouns Explainers"** covering the many layers of Nouns.
	* Keep a pulse on projects' progress and **share compelling updates on our social media accounts daily**.
* **Measuring Success**
	* We want to spend the next 6 months experimenting with different types of video formats, channels, storytelling, and more.
	* We will track the most relevant metrics to understand what works and what doesn't. Aside from reach (views), here are some key metrics we plan to measure: 
		*  **Builder recruitment** (how many people get noun-pilled thanks to our content and join our community?)
		*  **Content leverage** (how frequently and in what ways is our content used by other builders to further the DAO's interests?)
		*  **Content proliferation** (how and where our videos get re-uploaded, remixed, or used in a new context)
		*  **Video retention** (when & why do people drop in our videos?)
		*  **View sources** (where do poeople come from to watch our videos?)
	*  We will share these metrics publicly to engage the community and learn together.
* **Deliverables**
	* 8-10 high production value long-form videos (similar to [these](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eAenRhD8Whk) [ones](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S_GgY3WAKAQ)).
	* 140+ short form videos (similar to [these](https://twitter.com/nounish/status/1539991656988114946) [ones](https://twitter.com/nounish/status/1547686340564697088)).
	* Daily posts sharing updates from builders on our social media accounts (examples [1](https://www.instagram.com/reel/Ch49qrcItt8/) [2](https://twitter.com/nounish/status/1566003680482148353) [3](https://twitter.com/nounish/status/1565058557829070848))
	* Publish a CC0 video bank with our raw footage for anyone to use.
* **Accountability**
	* **Form a Steering Committee:** comprising of 4156 & 2 more trusted community members or subject matter experts.
		* Provide this committee with frequent updates on our strategy and get their feedback & guidance. We want this committee to keep us accountable.  
	* **Community involvement:** Monthly reports + open discord call with the DAO.
* **Staffing & Resources**
	* A team of 6 full-timers & 4 part-timers (142, Goldy & the entire Pixel team)
	* At least 10 shoot days around the world.

# The next 6 months

## The Challenges We Want To Tackle

[From Prop 64:](https://nouns.wtf/vote/64)
> * Prop builders don’t necessarily have the skills/resources/time to execute a marketing campaign for their projects.
> * Wonderful projects with really great output are not being amplified and we are missing out on a lot of noun proliferation potential.
> * It’s difficult to explain what Nouns are to the world. 

We believe that the problems we outlined in Prop 64 still exist. Most of the amazing projects that Nouns funds need help telling their story, and video is the best way to do so.

It is safe to assume that without the videos we published, Nouns DAO would have missed the opportunity of amplifying the stories of these wonderful projects. 

With video, we are able to tell a much deeper and colorful story and evoke much more emotion. We believe this must be 10Xed to recruit more builders to help the meme proliferate. 

## The Nouns Funnel

We think of builder & community onboarding as a funnel: 



* **Top of Funnel**: People who heear about Nouns from a friend, stumble upon a Nouns project in their city, enjoy a piece of nouns art on twitter etc. 
* **Middle of Funnel**: People who become curious to understand what Nouns are, want to learn how to get funded, or want to join the community.
* **Bottom of Funnel**: People who are ready to submit a proposal, buy a noun (or nounlet), or to join the community or a sub DAO.


In the next 6 months we want to focus on the **Middle of the Funnel**. We want to help explain what Nouns are to the world and get many more people noun-pilled. 

**Why focus on Middle of Funnel first and not Top of Funnel?**

The majority of people that have heard of Nouns do not really grok what it is, never-mind all the potential builders outside the NFT bubble that we are missing out on because it’s too esoteric to dive in to. In reality, almost no one gets what we’re doing, and it’s impossible for them to have a vision for Nouns.

The hurdle to understand what Nouns is and how to interact with the community is absurdly high for someone not native to our ecosystem.

It’s imperative that there’s quality consumable content out there that helps people **not only understand what Nouns is doing but be inspired to join in**. What we need is social media channels (eg. YouTube and Instagram) that have a significant catalogue of content you can just sit and consume. 

* We are going to try to answer questions that are not easily answered today like:
	* **“So what does nouns actually do and stand for?"**
		* This is a branding exercise, this is key for our work to answer.
	* **“What is Nouns actually to me?”**
		* The answer is not NFTs, or a DAO (that is just infrastructure), it's an open source brand that you can be funded to build on (or build on permissionlessly). It’s an energised and broad community. It’s a movement. We need to demonstrate this through our videos.
	* **“What’s a nounish concept / proposal?”**
		* Current way to understand this: read hundreds of proposals on nouns.wtf/vote, tally their results, investigate if they were “successful” or not, if the dao likes them, analyse all this data… etc. What if instead they could watch a handful of nounish videos that show the things we’re proud of?
	* **“How do I get funded?”**
		* Videos about this will be hugely valuable, currently it takes a lot of effort to understand this. Our top priority here is to make a few videos focused exclusively on getting funded via Prop House and then other videos about the other ways as a whole, and individual videos on specifics (on chain, nsfw etc.)
	* **“Can it be any cultural domain?”**
		* Here are some screenshots from version 1 of our intro. We will continue to experiment and iterate with ways to tell this story all the time. This is hugely important to be understood if we want to experiment in every vertical.

![](https://i.imgur.com/xeVv9Yh.jpg)

# One-Click Bots for the Nouns Ecosystem

**TL;DR** Enable any Nouns-derivative to launch customizable bots in minutes, with no code.

---

**How is this different from existing bots?**
No coding required! Fully customizable bots capable of sharing full spectrum of DAO's activity - New Proposals, Votes, Auctions, Secondary Sales, Listings, Collection Analytics etc.

**Who is this for?**
Any existing or future Nounish projects. 


---
Our Twitter and Discord bot would share ALL Nouns contract events, including proposals, auctions, votes, sales, and more. And with a simplified UI, any Nounish project can launch a customized bot in minutes in three easy steps:

1. **Connect the bot's social account to BotFrens**
2. **Specify Nounish contract address**
3. **Select behaviors the bot will perform**

We know that this sounds too simple, but we have the experience and tech chops to make it happen! We even built a prototype to illustrate how this will work: **YouTube Demo [https://youtu.be/2hjr5YcPGQg](https://youtu.be/2hjr5YcPGQg)**

# Noundry Community Compensation

This proposal aims to retroactively compensate the Noundry community for their part in making Season 0 a success. Total ask of 25 eth.

We believe the community is largely to thank for making Noundry into something more than a mere contest. Instead, the Noundry evolved into a collaborative experience — a festival — where artists from around the world came together to inspire and build upon each other's ideas, using Nouns pixel art as a canvas to unite around.

The artwork we eventually added to the Nouns Descriptor contract resulted from a group effort and would not have been the same without the participation of the larger community.

With this proposal, we want to acknowledge that the collaborative, explorative side of the Noundry is as vital as the outcome and hope to set an example for upcoming Noundrys.

## Compensation

### Community compensation

We think community compensation is best left to the community to decide. The alternatives would be equal distribution to all participants or attempting the almost impossible task of centrally deciding who had a meaningful impact on the Noundry. None of these options feel exciting or in the spirit of the Noundry.

To manage this, we're using [Coordinape](https://coordinape.com/), a community compensation platform, and want to allocate a pool of 24 eth for the Noundry season 0 community to split up amongst themselves.
 

**Coordinape rules**
- Participants eligible to vote: [https://hackmd.io/@krel/noundry-coordinape](https://hackmd.io/@krel/noundry-coordinape)
- Each participant receives three votes
- Participants allocate votes based on who they think had the largest positive impact on their own experience
- Participants cannot vote for themselves
- Participants cannot vote for artists with winning traits in Noundry Season 0
    - Facu, Gremplin, Goldy, Modrovsky, LuckyCryptoCats, Fuyu, Nountris

**Total: 24 eth**

### Summary
- Coordinape round: 24 eth
- Administration (run by maty): 1 eth
- **Total compensation: 25 eth**

# Noundry Winners & Committee Compensation

**This proposal aims to retroactively compensate winning artists and the curation committee of the first Noundry. Total ask of 142.69 eth.**

We believe that Noundry compensation is more than a box-ticking exercise. Pixel art is part of who we are; it's in our bones, and adding new pixels to the Descriptor contract is a big deal. It's an opportunity to celebrate nounishness, reinforce our culture, and create new traditions.

We want the Noundry to become a continuous event, a new tradition, and a significant driver of Nouns proliferation within artistic circles. In that light, the compensation outlined in this proposal is not just about the work that was completed, but also about future signaling.

We think one of the most exciting possible outcomes of the Noundry would be if every artist in the world aspires to put their artwork into the Nouns contract (and by extension, the public domain). And while high compensation may not be the primary motivator, it can help initiate the right feedback loop and create the breeding ground needed for future Noundrys to thrive.

## Compensation

### Winner compensation
*[https://nouns.wtf/vote/125](https://nouns.wtf/vote/125) (Integrate 8/8 Anniversary Art)*

Noundry Season 0 winners are compensated per winning trait. Artists with multiple winning submissions are rewarded for each submission.

Noun Head traits are more generously compensated as they are the most visually striking, tend to create the most excitement within the community, and are responsible for driving much of the Twitter discourse and enthusiasm around the Noundry.

    - Modrovsky x 1 (Index Card)

*Note: Gremplin declined compensation for the two glasses traits added in the upgrade, arguing that there should be a minimum degree of effort required for compensation.*

**Winning traits compensation**

- Accessories: 4 eth / trait

### Curation committee compensation
The curation committee played a crucial role in making Noundry Season 0 a success. They are compensated for organizing the event, curating, and fine-tuning the winning contributions. 

It's hard to put a figure value on the committee's efforts — in many ways it's priceless. We propose compensating the committee with a symbolic sum of 10.69 eth to distribute as they see fit.

# Agora continuation
*Note: for full discussion of the prop on discourse, please see this [link](https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/proposal-agora-continuation/2478).*

## TL;DR

We’d like to seek funding for a quarter (3 months) to keep developing [Agora](https://www.nounsagora.com/) in order to improve the governance efficacy of Nouns through delegation.

## Progress so far

We got [funded on August 31](https://prop.house/proposal/1023) via Prop House mandates to build an MVP. In less than one month, we’ve built a delegate platform for voters to broadcast what they want to see, and for builders to find voters who might support their prop. To illustrate the outcome with some numbers, so far we’ve seen:

* 17 statements from delegates representing 125 nouns (>25% of all votes!)
* 16 statements from builders who are seeking delegation
* 5 nouns delegated via Agora (that we know of)
* Proposal passed to [deploy a beta](https://lil-nouns-agora-dev.act.workers.dev/) on lil nouns

In sum, Agora has created a hub that turned delegation from an invisible, behind the scenes activity, to something the community can see, participate in, discuss, and improve upon.

## What’s next?

Our goal has always been to greatly improve the effectiveness of the Nouns DAO. We recognize that while the DAO lives and dies by the quality of its decision making, the time demand of being a good voter is such that we cannot expect most token holders to participate to the degree required. Therefore focusing on driving delegation of votes into the hands of qualified and engaged delegates is the highest leverage activity we can invest in – especially given that constant issuance means that delegation and governance engagement is naturally trending downwards.

Although creating a client like Agora to reduce friction and provide transparency is a necessary first step, we don’t think that alone will be enough to drive meaningful delegation. That’s why the next phase of Agora will not only continue to improve the delegation client, but also deliberately invest in programs and mechanisms that can greatly increase delegation and participation. We outline below the key areas we’ll focus on in the next phase of Agora.

## Focus areas

**Incentivize effective governance:** We believe there’s tremendous potential in creating incentives to reward effective governance, but also recognize the pitfalls of designing poor mechanisms. As such, we will be running a series of small scale incentive programs over the next months, with the goal of finding the best one to turn into a mechanism we can invest in for the long run. Below are some examples of incentive designs.

# heyanoun - pseudonymous messages about props

*thanks to Will Price for the delegated noun allowing us to make this proposal*

### tl;dr

A way for snapshotted nouners at a given proposal to pseudonymously submit messages about the proposal.

### proposal

We believe that Nouns DAO is where the most interesting public DAO conversation is happening today. 

Sometimes, not every opinion held is voiced though. In the past month of participating more in the DAO (noun 416), we’ve observed situations where privately held opinions don’t make it to the public discourse because they’re somewhat controversial. We believe that this is dangerous for governance. Unspoken and unresolved opinions can fester into resentment and political turmoil over time.

With this in mind, we’re building heyanoun, a way for nouners snapshotted by a proposal to comment on that proposal pseudonymously. 

![heyanoun mock](https://i.ibb.co/3BkBdHw/Untitled.png)

Nouners post a message on the heyanoun site, along with a zero-knowledge proof showing that they are in the snapshot to the relevant prop:

Messages will then be passed on to a designated channel (initially could just be the funded prop’s channel) in the nouns discord server:

![discord mock](https://i.ibb.co/9n3zpPW/Untitled-1.png)

All proofs will be hosted on IPFS and messages will have a link from which a user on discord can verify the proof’s veracity themselves.

We believe that this product, while simple, can surface unspoken opinions to the nouns public square and could be a huge boon to governance.

### about us

Personae Labs is a new R&D lab out of [0xPARC](https://0xparc.org/) investigating how new cryptography like ZK-SNARKs changes the way we communicate online. 

Read our manifesto [here](https://www.notion.so/Personae-Labs-d46a90c64953416eb386a0ae2ee7679b) or watch this recent announcement talk from one of our founders [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lpb1RkUoWEw).

We’ve built (to our knowledge) the earliest Eth-based pseudonymous social apps like [https://www.heyanon.xyz/](https://www.heyanon.xyz/) and [https://www.cabal.xyz/](https://www.cabal.xyz/) and are committed to furthering the technical and product frontiers here. 

Find us at 

- [https://twitter.com/personae_labs](https://twitter.com/personae_labs)
- personaelabs.eth
- noun 416

### compensation

We foresee this project taking ~1.5mo. of dedicated effort by a team of:

- 2 engineers
- 1 designer
- 1 PM

Components to be delivered:

1. website for submitting message + ZKPs for all proposals
2. all relevant zkp circuits
3. discord bot for posting messages
4. website for verifying proofs of messages (from bot)

Given a rate of 10 ETH/mo for each contributor, we’re requesting **60 ETH total** for delivery of this first app.  

### future work

We hope this app is the first of many experiments around pseudonymity within Nouns DAO.

If this first iteration sees traction, we see a number of further extensions:

- extend the number of places that messages are published, i.e. to a dedicated twitter account as well as discord
- plugins/react components to integrate pseudonymous badges/proving into other governance clients (i.e. agora, discourse killer)
- additional pseudonymous nouner groups, i.e. groups based on voting history (I voted in 10 of last 15 proposals)

# Nouns DAO V2 Upgrade

## Summary

This proposal updates the Nouns DAO logic contract to a new version, with the following improvements and additions:

1. **Dynamic Quorum**: In V1, quorum is a fixed percentage of total supply. In V2, quorum has a dynamic range, rising as a function of against votes up to a defined cap. Read [this post](https://mirror.xyz/0x10072dfc23771101dC042fD0014f263316a6E400/96zSoFfiT_RM2o2P9UbVKxPzVpB_trZqUjzllBE00BE) for more info.
2. **Vote with Gas Refund**: Allow Nouners/delegates to vote and receive a gas refund. The vote still takes place in the case of insufficient ETH to refund.
3. **Voting Delay Editing Bug Fix**: In V1, editing voting delay was unsafe. V2 makes it safe to edit anytime. More info on the bug [here](https://github.com/nounsDAO/nouns-diligence/blob/main/reports/proposal-58.md#major).
4. **Cancel Proposal Bug Fix**: The DAO has a spam mitigation feature, allowing anyone to cancel a proposal if the proposer has an amount of votes less than or equal to proposal threshold. In V1, this feature didn't work when proposer had exactly proposal threshold votes; in V2 it works as expected.
5. **Vetoer Change Is Now 2-step**: We received audit feedback that V1's vetoer change process was risky as a single-step process. In V2, the risk of setting a wrong vetoer is mitigated using a 2-step process where the current vetoer sets a pending new vetoer. Once set, the pending vetoer must accept for the change to take place.

## Audit

1. The code has gone through internal reviews and a [code4rena audit](https://code4rena.com/reports/2022-08-nounsdao/).
2. **No high-risk issues were found in V2**.
3. **Unrelated to this proposal**, one high-risk issue was found. See [this audit summary on discourse](https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/nouns-dao-v2-audit-summary/2525) for more information.


## Dynamic Quorum Parameters

As articulated in this [detailed post](https://mirror.xyz/0x10072dfc23771101dC042fD0014f263316a6E400/96zSoFfiT_RM2o2P9UbVKxPzVpB_trZqUjzllBE00BE), three parameters need to be set for dynamic quorum. This proposal sets their values, and we’re offering the thinking behind them here:

1. **Minimum quorum %**: keeping it at 10%, the same as today’s quorum.
2. **Maximum quorum %**: setting it to 15%, taking into account recent participation levels around 30%, allowing proposals with more than 15% For votes to be decided by simple majority; the intent is for this value to provide extra protection from voter apathy, while allowing most all proposals to be decided by simple majority rather than quorum.
3. **Coefficient**: setting it to 1, such that each against vote raises the quorum requirement by one vote, until the maximum quorum is reached.

These parameters can be edited at any time via a proposal; treat these values as the first experiment.

## Vote with Gas Refund

A bit more on how this feature works:

1. Governance clients (like nouns.wtf/vote) need to update their code to support it.
2. Refunds are subject to certain constraints:
    1. Gas base fee is capped at 200 gwei.
    2. Gas priority fee is capped at 2 gwei.
    3. Total gas is capped at 200K, supporting voting reason text up to roughly 9,190 characters.
    4. If the contract’s balance is insufficient, voter will receive a partial refund.
3. This feature requires the DAO to maintain the DAO contract’s ETH balance, which should be done via periodic ETH transfer proposals from the treasury to the DAO contract (this proposal performs the first funding).
4. The DAO can choose to withdraw refund ETH back into the treasury at any time via a proposal.


## Proposal Transactions for Humans

1. `_setImplementation`: upgrades DAO logic to V2.
2. `_setDynamicQuorumParams`: sets dynamic quorum params to:
    1. Minimum quorum BPs: 10% (1000 basis points).
    2. Maximum quorum BPs: 15% (1500 basis points).
    3. Coefficient: 1 (1,000,000 in unsigned integer with 6 decimal places).
3. `transfer`: funding vote refunds with 12 ETH, which should be enough for just over 100 proposals at today's participation rate (excluding honk’s tendency to paste long paragraphs).

As always, please reach out in the [#54-tech-grants](https://discord.com/channels/849745721544146955/981584123225321503) channel in Discord with any questions ⌐◨-◨.

# Agora Continuation [revised]
*This is a revised version of the Agora continuation prop based on community feedback. We've clarified our deliverables, increased transparency, reduced the ask by 20%, and implemented a payment stream*

## TL;DR
We’d like to seek funding to keep developing [Agora](https://www.nounsagora.com/) in order to improve the governance efficacy of Nouns through delegation. Our goal is to significantly increase the participation rate of nouns through a combination of software improvements, and delegation drive programs over the next quarter.

## Progress so far
We got [funded](https://prop.house/proposal/1023) on August 31 via Prop House mandates to build an MVP. In less than one month, we’ve built a delegate platform for voters to broadcast what they want to see, and for builders to find voters who might support their proposal. To illustrate the outcome with some numbers, so far we’ve seen:

* 19 statements from delegates representing 127 nouns (>25% of all votes!)
* 25 statements from builders who are seeking delegation
* 5 nouns delegated via Agora (that we know of)
* Hosted a delegate race to “auction” 3 more votes to delegates
* Proposal passed to deploy on lil nouns, as well as inbound interest from many other DAOs

In sum, Agora has created a hub that turned delegation from an invisible, behind the scenes activity, to something the community can see, participate in, discuss, and improve upon.

## Roadmap & Goals
Now that we’ve landed an MVP of a delegate platform, it’s time to start leveraging it to meaningfully drive delegation & governance participation. We expect to complete these goals and achieve their resulting outcome in roughly one quarter. Note that all points here consist of our best plan of attack today, but as we continue to build Agora, we expect the roadmap to naturally evolve as we double down on what’s working, and deprioritize what’s not.

**Goal 1: Dramatically reduce friction to delegation:**
* Integrate with nouns.wtf to propose “post-win” delegate suggestions
* Enable direct delegation on Agora (where today we borrow the nouns.wtf flow)
* Enable time-bound, fractional, and supercedable delegation by a proxy contract to unblock funds & whales who are currently unwilling to delegate
* Productize delegate race so that Nouners who don’t want to pick a delegate can let the community pick for them

**Goal 2: Make governance and delegation more transparent and easy to understand**
* Continue investing in surfacing more delegate and voting data on Agora
* Build a governance activity feed that highlights delegation, ownership change, voting, and other governance related activities.
* Make other general improvements to Agora to make it a first class experience for governance participants

**Goal 3: Activate nouns holders to either vote or delegate**
* Direct outreach to inactive Nouners from Agora team to find them a suitable delegate
* Implement an inactive nouner bounty program, highlighting and incentivizing the community to reach out to inactive holders.
* Run a marketplace experiment to allow anyone to rent votes from Nouns holders
* Run a direct reward (in both ETH and NFT prizes) experiment to directly incentivize voting

**Target objectives in 3 months:**
* 75% of new nouns are delegated to voters who vote on more than 50% of props they're eligible to
* 50% participation in a rolling average of past 3 proposals

## Transparency & decentralization
As a governance platform, we will take measures to maintain transparency and avoid centralization of power by taking the following measures: 
* Make Github repo public within 1 month (with proper documentation to come over time)
* Publish all data monthly to public google sheets, or equivalent (such as API or onchain mirror)
* Current Agora team members added together will commit to not represent more than 5% of nouns.

## Team
Yitong – Project lead & designer: co-founder of Vector DAO, and previously design + product at Coinbase. Prop builder for #87, contributor to Nouns Vision, delegate.

0xcaff – Engineer: Built the v1 of Agora, previously engineer at Coinbase.

Tom Taubkin – Protocol Engineer: Contributor to several defi projects, previously engineer at Coinbase

Mrtn – Ops / Community: Delegate from nounlets, funded via Prop House as governance historian, deployed Agora on lil nouns, previously pm on nouns.builder, and pm at Google.

## Funding request & terms
**Funding request:**

We’d like to request $221,000 to fund the team for a quarter (170ETH @ $1300/ETH, a 20% decrease from previous ask) and 20 ETH to incentivize voter participation.

**Fund transfer mechanics**

50% of the team portion & the participation incentive will be immediately deposited to the team’s wallet

50% of the team portion will be streamed over a period of three months from a 3/5 multisig held by trusted members of the community. Signers for this safe will be: Elad, Krel, Yitong, Seneca, and one more to be confirmed.

As of this writing, $221,000 is 170 ETH. In order to account for ETH volatility, we will request a 30 ETH buffer. Upon fund release, $221,000 worth of ETH will be sold, with half deposited to the Agora multisig, and half deposited to the stream multisig. The remaining ETH will be sent back to the treasury.

# The Nouns AI Pod

## DESCRIPTION:

The AI generated scripted, voiced over, and visuals created PROMO video for the pod :)

[The AI pod promo Video!!](https://youtu.be/b5Ojfo6gVcU)

### **TL;DR:**

Following the initial AI residency, we wish to create The Nouns AI Pod.

This prop is to fund 3 months of focus on continuing the research of our resident AI researchers:

1. Further empowering Roko to be an AI secretary/assistant for the DAO! Helping information flow better with summaries, transcripts, reviews, answering questions and more. 
2. Generating Nounish rich media (images, gifs, videos) and making the tools to generate such media accessible to the community at large to unleash their creativity
3. Empowering other pods (e.g. ai-based team drafting for e-sports, planning events for otg)

With each of these being built with monetization / expansion to other organizations in mind.

---

### WELL HOW DID THE INITIAL RESEARCH GO?

You can see the initial small grant proposal here [https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/small-grants-the-nouns-ecosystem-and-ai/1929](https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/small-grants-the-nouns-ecosystem-and-ai/1929)  and Honk's extension post here [https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/nouns-ai-honk-residency-extension/2357](https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/nouns-ai-honk-residency-extension/2357)

![https://imgur.com/JPkgn07](https://imgur.com/JPkgn07.png)

[https://staging.roko.dev/](https://staging.roko.dev/) Is a live website where the team is experimenting and adding features with the goal of building a production ready webapp.

We initially set out to accomplish two sprints, the first to be able to break down proposals into understandable summaries / reviews. The second was more focused on demonstrating some of the possibilities of AI and what it could bring to Nouns.

I am happy to report that, thanks to an engaged community and support from key contributors Honk and Evets.eth we blew that goal out of the water.

Together, we:

- Held weekly sessions on Tuesdays which about 30 people regularly attended that shared developments with the project as well as educating them on fundamentals as well as cutting edge developments in machine learning
- Built a pipeline that can breakdown proposals into reviews automatically as they as proposed on-chain (and post them to Twitter!!)
- Built pipeline to turn recorded calls into text using SOTA voice to text then using a large language model to convert them into a bulleted summary

- Built a web interface that enables participants to easily consume summarized proposal content as well as edit them to better reflect their opinions
    - [https://staging.roko.dev/](https://staging.roko.dev/)
- Tested the ability to finetune our model using user generated content as guidance
- Setup a backend infrastructure setup to support the ongoing development and improvement of the web interface
- In addition, due to popular demand we began diving deep into AI generated media, we were able to generate images and video content (reactive to sound!) that features custom content (Noggles!)
